Surfing Programs at
Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon Water Park
Catch a wave during an Open Surf session or a Private Surf event in our state-of-the-art wave pool.
Disney's Typhoon Lagoon Water Park

Disney's Typhoon Lagoon Water Park Park Hours
Hang 10
Show off your surfing skills on dozens of waves at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park!
Experienced riders can shoot the curl in North America’s largest outdoor wave pool before the park opens or after it closes. This is your chance to spend some time shredding it up.
Each 3-hour session comes packed with 100 waves—broken into sets of 25.
Whether you join us for Open Surf or a Private Surf session, you’re sure to ride more than your fair share of waves. Prepare yourself for an epic paddle-out and one tubular ride-in!
Open Surf and Private Surf
Open Surf
Share the pool with other surfers and spend a few hours riding the waves.
Read More
Share the pool with other surfers and spend a few hours riding the waves.
During Open Surf, you can join in with other groups who want to make a splash. Each surfer is guaranteed at least 10 waves.
Event Times
Morning Open Surf: 6:30 AM to 9:30 AM
Evening Open Surf: Begins 30 minutes after park closing and lasts for 3 hours

Please be at the Main Entrance to Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park 30 minutes prior to scheduled start time. It is important that your entire party arrive on time to sign waivers. Any delays could result in missing waves.
Pricing
$325 per surfer
Full payment is due at the time of booking. Prices and information are subject to change.
Book your event now or email us for additional information.
Private Surf
Host your own special event where it’s just you, your friends and the waves!
Read More
Host your own special event where it’s just you, your friends and the waves!

Get stoked to ride 100 waves at your very own, private session. Invite 14 of your closest friends to surf and join you for a rockin’ good time. You can even bring a playlist of your favorite tunes to play over the loudspeaker!
Event Times
Morning Private Surf: 6:30 AM to 9:30 AM
Evening Private Surf: Begins 30 minutes after park closing and lasts for 3 hours
Evening Private Surf end times may vary if additional waves are added to sessions. Evening events are able to book up to an additional 50 waves.

Please be at the Main Entrance to Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park 30 minutes prior to scheduled start time. It is important that your entire party arrives on time to sign waivers. Any delays could result in missing waves.
Pricing
The base price for Private Surf events (includes up to 15 surfers and spectators) is $2,250.
An additional charge of $90 (tax included) will be added to each additional group of 5 people (or less). The additional charge (tax included) will vary based on the number of Guests, as follows:
16 to 20 Guests: $90
21 to 25 Guests: $180
26 to 30 Guests: $270
31 to 35 Guests: $360
36 to 40 Guests: $450
The maximum party size may not exceed 40 Guests.
Book your event now or email us for additional information.
Get Ready to Surf
Rules & Regulations
Review important rules before you arrive for your Surf Event.
Read More
Review important rules before you arrive for your Surf Event.
Photography is permitted during events and must adhere to the following conditions:
Event participants must use a GoPro camera mounted to the surfer’s head, chest or surfboards for photos taken while surfing.
No other brand or camera type is permitted.
Cameras should never be held in the event participant’s mouth or hand.
All photographs taken pursuant to this section may only be used for personal purposes.
No extended handheld device, including selfie sticks, or drones are permitted.

Spectators must remain out of the water—on the wave walls or on the islands. The only in-water photos permitted will be GoPro cameras attached to each surfer from behind the redline that runs along the bottom of the Surf Pool.
Event participants and spectators may not bring any glass containers, alcoholic beverages, weapons or illegal drugs to the Walt Disney World Resort.
Consent/Release forms must be signed by all event participants prior to participating.
Event participants must enter the event location via the steps on the North Wave Wall, closest to the back wall of the event location.
Stairs are for traveling down to the event location only. Event participants must NEVER travel up the stairs leading from the event location.

Only one event participant will be permitted to surf at a time, except for the “Reverse V” (Center Peak) Wave, when 2 event participants may generally be permitted. Please be aware that Center Peaks are only available during Private Surf sessions.
While riding the “Reverse V” (Center Peak) Wave, event participants must ride opposite faces of the wave. Please be aware that Center Peaks are only available during Private Surf sessions.
Event participants must remain at least 10 feet from all side walls and must remain at least 25 feet from the back wall of the event location for the duration of their ride.
Upon completion of any ride, event participants must immediately exit the water at the beach and return to the North or South Wave wall via the walkways.
Wading in the event location by event spectators shall not be permitted.
Neither event spectators nor event participants waiting to enter the event location shall be permitted to sit on wave walls or guard stands.
Event participants and/or event spectators are not permitted near the red button on the Guard stand, as it will terminate event waves and take 30 minutes to restart.

Event participants and event spectators shall only be permitted near the pool area. Any event spectators and/or event participants found in unauthorized areas shall be escorted from Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park.
At the conclusion of the event, all event participants and event spectators must exit Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park and the parking areas.
Conduct of all event participants and event spectators is the responsibility of the person that booked the event.
Requested music for the event must meet “Disney” standards and should not contain objectionable material (e.g. profanity).
Failure to follow these rules can result in the cancellation of remaining waves, ending the event without a refund.
Know Before You Go
Space is extremely limited for surf events so be sure to make your reservations ahead of time.
Read More
Space is extremely limited for surf events so be sure to make your reservations ahead of time.
Important Information
Reservations are non-transferable and may not be sold or bartered.

Guests are responsible for bringing their own boards and any other surfing equipment. Disney's Typhoon Lagoon water park will not supply any boards for your event. Please know that towels will be provided to all surfers.
Guests may bring food and beverages into the park, but alcohol and glass containers are prohibited.
Guests over the age of 18 are required to present a government-issued photo ID to attend this program.
Camera sticks, such as "selfie sticks," and drones are not permitted into the park.
Admission to Disney's Typhoon Lagoon water park is not required.
Each session lasts approximately 3 hours, depending on the number of waves.
Surfers do not have to surf all their waves, but missed waves will not be made up.
Payment and Cancellation Policy
Full payment is due at the time of booking. Your event date will not be confirmed until full payment has been made.
If cancellation is requested at least 7 days prior to your event, a full refund will be issued.
If cancellation is requested within 7 days of your event, you will forfeit the full cost of your reservation.
Book your sessions now.
Private Surf Event Details
Center peak waves will be offered for evening events only and may account for no more than half of your total waves.
Frequently Asked Questions
Private Surf Event FAQs
How many Guests can attend my Private Surf event?

Answer

The standard event price includes a maximum number of 15 Guests, including participants and spectators.

An additional charge of $90 (tax included) will be added to each additional group of 5 people (or less). The additional charge (tax included) will vary based on the number of Guests, as follows:

  • 16 to 20 Guests: $90
  • 21 to 25 Guests: $180
  • 26 to 30 Guests: $270
  • 31 to 35 Guests: $360
  • 36 to 40 Guests: $450

The maximum party size may not exceed 40 Guests.
What equipment must I bring?

Answer

Guests are responsible for bringing their own boards. Acceptable boards include surf boards, long boards, paddle boards and boogie boards. Body surfing is strictly prohibited.

Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park will not supply any boards for your event.

Please be aware that towels will be provided for all surf events.
Can we buy food and drinks onsite?

Answer

Yes, light snack options will be available for purchase during Private Surf events.*

*Please email WDPR.Surfing.Programs@disney.com for any additional food and beverage needs.
Can we bring in our own food and drinks?

Answer

Food and nonalcoholic beverages are permitted.

Glass containers are not permitted in the park at any time. You are permitted to bring in coolers, which are subject to search prior to entering the park.

Alcoholic beverages are not permitted.
Can I play my own music?

Answer

Yes. Guests will be able to link their smartphone devices to speakers in order to play music during the event.

All music must fall within Disney standards and cannot contain any objectionable material (e.g. profanity).
How long will my event last?

Answer

The duration of Private Surf events will vary.

Morning events are limited to 100 waves, which typically takes about 3 hours. Events will end 15 minutes before the park opens. Evening events will take place after the park closes and the duration is dependent on the number of waves scheduled.
How many waves are included?
AnswerAll events include 100 waves.
How big are the waves?
AnswerWaves run 5½ feet high. Wave height cannot be adjusted.
Can I choose the types of waves that I surf?

Answer

You can choose between left peak, right peak or center peak waves. Center peak waves, also known as a-frame waves, are offered for night events only and may account no more than half of your total waves. They are not offered at morning events due to time constraints.

You may choose combinations of waves in increments of 25. For example, your waves could follow this order:

  • 25 left waves
  • 25 right waves
  • 25 center waves
  • 25 right waves
This will give you a total of 100 waves.
Open Surf Event FAQs
How many Guests can attend my Open Surf event?
AnswerEach surfer is allowed to bring up to 2 spectators. Additional spectators may be subject to an additional fee per spectator.
What equipment must I bring?

Answer

Guests are responsible for bringing their own boards. Acceptable boards include surf boards, long boards, paddle boards and boogie boards. Body surfing is strictly prohibited.

Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park will not supply any boards for your event.

Please be aware that towels will be provided for all surf events.
Can we bring in our own food and drinks?

Answer

Food and nonalcoholic beverages are permitted.

Glass containers are not permitted in the park at any time. You are permitted to bring in coolers, which are subject to search prior to entering the park.

Alcoholic beverages are not permitted.
How many waves are included?
AnswerOpen Surf events guarantee 10 waves per surfer. Due to time constraints, waves that are missed cannot be made up and will not be refunded.
How big are the waves?
AnswerWaves run 5½ feet high. Wave height cannot be adjusted.
Can I choose the types of waves that I surf?

Answer

Yes, your group gets to choose which direction the waves start (either right peak or left peak). As the session continues, the waves will change direction periodically.

Please note that center peak waves will not be available for Open Surf events.
Can I add additional waves at my event?
AnswerAdditional waves cannot be added for Open Surf events.
General Questions
Can I film/photograph my event?

Answer

You and your Guests are permitted to take photographs during your scheduled event. Any photographs taken while surfing must use a GoPro camera mounted to the surfer's head, chest or surfboard. A surfer may not hold or put a camera in their mouth.

No other brand or type of camera will be permitted. Camera sticks, such as "selfie sticks" or drones are not permitted into the park.

Event spectators are allowed to take photographs, but they must do so from outside of the water.
Is there an age limit for Guests who can surf?

AnswerThere is no age limit for Guests participating in Open or Private Surf events. Guests under the age of 18 must have a consenting parent or legal guardian present. All Guests, participants and spectators will sign a release at the beginning of the event.
Is there a cancellation policy?

AnswerYes, a full refund will be issued if the reservation is cancelled at least 7 days prior to your event. If cancellation is requested within 7 days of your event, you will forfeit the full cost of your reservation.
When can I book an event?
AnswerEvents can be booked up to 60 days in advance. Events cannot be booked within 2 weeks.
What happens if there is inclement weather?

AnswerDisney's Typhoon Lagoon Water Park will monitor the weather throughout your event. If lightning strikes within 10 miles of the water park, the event will take a 30-minute delay. Guests will be presented options for continuing or cancelling as necessary.
What happens if there is a wave pool malfunction?

Answer

Disney's Typhoon Lagoon water park will communicate any mechanical issues with the wave pool or performance waves up to the start of and throughout your event.

If a mechanical issue is to arise, Guests will be advised on options for continuing, cancelling or rescheduling, when permissible. If the event needs to be cancelled by the park operations team, options for rescheduling will be offered or a full refund may be issued for the cancelled event if no dates are available. Dates and times of the event are subject to change.
Pricing and Payment
How much does it cost to rent out the wave pool?

Answer

Wave pool rental is $2,250 and includes up to 15 surfers.
How do I pay?

AnswerFull payment is due at the time of booking. We currently accept the following credit cards: Visa, American Express, MasterCard, Diners Club Card, Discover Card and JCB (Japanese Credit Bureau). Your event date will not be confirmed until full payment has been made.
Arriving to the Event
Where can we check in and at what time should we be there?

Answer

You must arrive at the Main Entrance of Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park 30 minutes prior to your event time. Your Surf Event Coordinator will meet you there.

All participants and spectators must arrive together to complete consent forms. The Surf Event Coordinator must be notified if any Guests will be arriving late or leaving early. Guests may not enter the park unattended outside of park hours.

Please be aware that Guests over the age of 18 are required to present a government-issued photo ID to attend this program.

Please be aware there is no parking fee at Typhoon Lagoon water park.
